question: Show names of teachers and the courses they are arranged to teach in ascending alphabetical order of the teacher's name.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Course FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID ORDER BY T3.Name
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2, T2.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.col_1 = T3.col_1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T3.col_2 = T2.col_1 ORDER BY T1.col_2 ASC;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2, T2.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.col_1 = T3.col_1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T3.col_2 = T2.col_1 ORDER BY T1.col_2 ASC;
